helpers_kept.name: isolatedProperties
helpers_kept.replaces: the repeated 5-key mapOf("type" to "ducklake", METADATA_URL to isolated.jdbcUrl(), METADATA_USER to isolated.user(), METADATA_PASSWORD to isolated.password(), STORAGE_WAREHOUSE to isolated.dataDir().toAbsolutePath().toString())
helpers_kept.returns_linkedhashmap_rationale: the s3-credentials test builds a mutable LinkedHashMap and puts extra keys; returning LinkedHashMap (not Map) lets that site keep mutating in place

helpers_kept.name: require / orFail
helpers_kept.signature: require(optional: Optional<T>, message: String): T  // + internal Optional<T>.orFail(message): T
helpers_kept.replaces: optional.orElseThrow { AssertionError(message) } on metadata SPI Optionals (table handles, scan-range path)
helpers_kept.interop: @JvmStatic require is the Java surface; orFail is internal Kotlin-only sugar

candidates_dropped.name: connectWithIsolated
candidates_dropped.rationale: wrapping create+use in a higher-order helper hides the .use {} resource boundary, the single most important line a connector test should show explicitly. Bodies also vary (getMetadata vs getScanPlanProvider vs both). isolatedProperties already removes the bulk of the duplication; the residual create(props, ctx).use {} reads fine inline.

candidates_dropped.name: populatedFormatDesc
candidates_dropped.rationale: ThriftParity already owns a file-local private populatedFormatDesc; ScanPlanProvider inlines the same 3-call shape twice but for a different purpose (reads icebergParams, not golden diff). Split across two intents and one file already encapsulates it.

candidates_dropped.name: name / precision (DuckLakeTypeMapping accessors)
candidates_dropped.rationale: single file (DuckLakeTypeMappingTest), already private one-liners; cross-file promotion adds an import for zero other callers.

candidates_dropped.name: fakeContext
candidates_dropped.rationale: trivial 2-arg constructor; not worth its own helper. Capabilities test legitimately varies it; folding it into isolatedProperties/create would over-couple.

bar: >= 3 distinct sites AND >= 2 files AND helper shorter/clearer than inline (per combined-kit-notes.json combine-pass verdict)
verification: not applicable for this step — kit is an artifact proposal, call sites unchanged; rollout/keep decided by the combine pass
